# ASBM — AI Workflow Automation for European SMEs

ASBM is a Belgian AI automation agency founded by Aljosja Bourgeois,
serving small and medium enterprises across Europe. We identify the
biggest operational bottlenecks in a business and build AI-powered
automations that eliminate them — saving clients 10+ hours per week.

Contact: info@as-bm.eu
Phone: +32 456 99 02 18
Languages: EN, NL, FR
Region: European Union (Belgium-based)

## Services

- AI Automation Consulting: A focused session that identifies which processes cost the most time and delivers a prioritised roadmap with estimated time savings.
- AI Workflow Audit: A deep-dive audit that maps how data moves through the business, surfaces hidden inefficiencies, and delivers a concrete report with every opportunity and its projected time saving.
- Intelligent Automation Implementation: End-to-end build of AI-powered automations — data integration, workflow automation, document AI processing, and communication automation.
- Ongoing Support & Maintenance: Proactive monitoring, API update handling, monthly performance reviews, and direct support from the team that built the system.
